import os
import pytest


@pytest.fixture
def api_key():
    key = os.environ.get("TEST_API_KEY")
    if not key:
        pytest.skip("TEST_API_KEY not set")
    return key


@pytest.fixture
def jwt_secret():
    return os.environ.get("TEST_JWT_SECRET", "test-secret-not-real")


@pytest.fixture
def db_credentials():
    return {
        "username": os.environ.get("TEST_DB_USER", "test_user"),
        "password": os.environ.get("TEST_DB_PASSWORD", "test_password"),
        "host": os.environ.get("TEST_DB_HOST", "localhost"),
    }


@pytest.fixture
def private_key():
    key_path = os.environ.get("TEST_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH")
    if key_path and os.path.exists(key_path):
        with open(key_path) as f:
            return f.read()
    pytest.skip("No test private key available")
